exceptions: California does not require voters to show ID at the polls. First-time voters who registered by mail and did not provide ID when registering may need to show ID.
provisionalBallotRules: Any voter may cast a provisional ballot if their eligibility is questioned. The ballot is counted after eligibility is confirmed.
phonesAtPollsDetail: Voters may use phones to access their marked sample ballot or polling place information inside the voting booth.
